{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Eruption Ring
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eruption Ring]] is a technique modeled on a [[Dreadgod]]'s power that releases a wall of [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
